# UC-12.1.21 · GitLab CI Job Artifact Upload Failures by Project

## Description

Detects recurring artifact upload failures that block downstream deploy stages and retention policies.

## Value

Surfaces projects where artifact publishing breaks so release artifacts and security scans stay available.

## Implementation

Enable pipeline webhooks or use the GitLab Add-on; ensure `job_name`, `status`, and failure messages are extracted. Alert when failures repeat for one project in 24h.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="gitlab:pipeline" status=failed
| search "uploading artifacts" OR "Uploading artifacts" OR artifact*
| stats count as failures, values(job_name) as jobs by project_id, project_path
| where failures >= 3
| sort -failures
```

## Visualization

Table (projects with failure counts), Bar chart (failures by project).

## References

- [GitLab Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6848)
- [GitLab CI/CD logs to Splunk (Lantern)](https://lantern.splunk.com/Data_Descriptors/GitLab/Getting_Gitlab_CICD_data_out_of_a_Gitlab_Pipeline_into_Splunk)
